overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit downtown district featuring giant holographic koi fish swimming between futuristic skyscrapers. The scene is dominated by teal and orange neon lighting against a dark night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown boulevard with holographic displays

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of the street toward the giant holographic fish swimming overhead

entered.detail: large glowing orange holographic fish with flowing fin tendrils
large glowing cyan holographic fish with flowing fin tendrils
tall dark skyscraper with circular white logo near the top
tall building with red neon signage and geometric patterns
multiple illuminated advertisements and digital displays on building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic cyberpunk city street at night, with two massive holographic koi fish—one orange and one blue—swimming in the air between towering corporate skyscrapers adorned with neon advertisements. The camera moves steadily forward along the empty street toward the circling holograms.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching palm tree lined section of downtown

events.description: holographic orange and blue koi fish cross paths and begin circling each other in a synchronized pattern

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the holographic fish swim in a circular pattern overhead, crossing from one side to the other

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: As the camera advances, the holographic fish cross paths and begin swimming in a circular formation around each other. Palm trees become visible on the right side of the street, growing larger as the camera approaches them.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm tree canopy section of neon boulevard

events.description: palm tree fronds and trunk temporarily obscure the view of the holographic fish
dense palm tree foliage on the right creates partial blockage of the street view

agents.ego_description: moving forward through a section of palm trees lining the street, with the holographic fish visible through the fronds overhead

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through a cluster of palm trees lining the street, their fronds creating temporary occlusion of the holographic fish swimming overhead. The fish continue their circular dance, now visible through the foliage as the camera moves past the tree line.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown street beyond palm trees

agents.ego_description: continuing past the palm trees with an unobstructed view of the circling holographic fish against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Having passed the palm trees, the camera continues forward with a clear view of the holographic koi fish, which maintain their mesmerizing circular swimming pattern between the neon-lit corporate towers. The street opens up again with the buildings framing the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk street that transitions from an open urban canyon into a palm-lined corridor before returning to a wide city vista. It begins with a steady advance toward two massive holographic koi fish, one orange and one blue, swimming between towering corporate skyscrapers. As the camera progresses, the fish begin to circle one another in a synchronized dance while palm trees emerge on the right side of the street. The view then shifts as the camera passes through the cluster of palm trees, their fronds momentarily obscuring the glowing holograms overhead. Finally, the scene opens up again as the camera clears the foliage, revealing a full view of the circling koi framed by the dark night sky and neon-lit towers.
